stemHtml:
An aircraft maintains a constant indicated altitude of 4 500 ft from A (360 ft AMSL - QNH 986 hPa) to B (690 ft AMSL - QNH 1011 hPa). Assuming that the altimeter sub-scale setting remains unchanged at 986 hPa, the height of the aircraft above the surface at B are:
(Barometric lapse rate: 27 ft/hPa)
